name: gitlab
description: Generated TGG ruleset: gitlab CST <-> Hub-IR. Bidirectional — the engine derives CST->IR and IR->CST from this one set (model a).

rules.name: R_gitlab_artifact_user_comment
rules.documentation: gitlab: user `# foo` comment under artifact <-> hub:comment lexical node

rules.name: R_gitlab_job_agent_tags_item_map
